creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #3)

> … Is there markup for an inline command?

I guess not: 

% rg --count \\[\\.filename\]\# /usr/doc | less
% rg --count \\[\\.command\]\# /usr/doc
% rg --count \\[\\.cmd\]\# /usr/doc
% rg --count \\[\\.exe /usr/doc
%
